{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321225131D3C86B5AC004B86493E1"}"},"total":64},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613800088843993880","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的挺好的，感觉实打实的青春高中，没有，一上来开很大的金手指，也没有突如其来的一见钟情，文笔细腻，而且节奏也刚刚好，看评分有点低，作者可以投到女频试试，不太像比较常见的男频流","text_exts":[{"e":43,"s":39,"text":"一见钟情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774104691B86493E1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227613800088843993880%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227589595842722417689%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%80%E8%A7%81%E9%92%9F%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772729935,"group_id":"7589595842722417689","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望人人都多点智商","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2oHVVcGlNTYul0U/KFcamyQFgZQpCBsEyD3EUZFM0kd","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/414f915c07a94917ad0068f1ea68e58e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621161&x-signature=rtL6c8hIytMQradVu8bCgi7Zvvs%3D","user_id":"1181314833718798","user_name":"美味的蟹黄堡：）"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1181314833718798","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589595842722417689","book_info":{"abstract":"【诸天流】+【系统】+【圆梦】 
陈希瘫痪了十二年，突然得到了重来的机会。
穿梭诸天影视，经历不同世界，激活专属任务，享受一段段不凡的人生。

第一站：《少年派》 （较细）
仅引用人设和较重要剧情，多原创（第一个世界节奏较慢）
【当前任务：解锁生命中缺失的“第一次”】 
跑步、打球、甚至早恋……每解锁一个新体验，即可获取属性奖励！ 带飞林妙妙，在这个热血的青春里，活成最耀眼的光！

后续世界暂定： 《致青春》、《匆匆那年》、《小巷人家》等…… 

穿梭诸天，从校园到都市。 
陈希的目标很简单：体验从未有过的精彩人生！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/aec963a281fcbee7b002c6284428d83e","author":"你学习了吗","author_id":"","book_id":"7589595842722417689","book_name":"开局少年派，畅游影视世界","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7589595960028709401","read_count":"22777","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"368014"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"162","tags":"男频衍生,系统,诸天万界,同人,综影视,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8a6da9e7944a2af127e2fa5df5fb21f9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288691&x-signature=976sTDOQYszb2CL8cTO5IYewo84%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2120334427562024","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321225131D3C86B5AC004B86493E1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_coun nt":0,"listen_duration":18362,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33538,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1554},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615997618468438808","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好，没有大雷，就是评论区的要写成后宫的这些言论，作者千万要慎重考虑，目前来看，主角跟小琪之间的关系跟普通，没有其他互动，贸然写就跟突兀，而且，少年派中根本就不适合写后宫，也不符合国情，后宫的话必须有一个人是三啊，而且剧情也不是很小说的那种，与现实很符合，根本就不适合写后宫，最后，我看现在也没有要写后宫的倾向，这一点让我很放心看，所以如果要写后宫的话，能否告知一下，我好及时止损[哭]我不怎么喜欢。

最后的最后，一定不要断更啊[哭]起码把这个故事写完，千万不要烂尾和断更啊[哭]

四星只是我的风格，很少给书评五星，四星在我心里就是好书了，作者文笔还行，男主剧情嵌入的也不突兀，还是挺不错的[赞]","text_exts":[{"e":75,"s":72,"text":"少年派","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%91%E5%B9%B4%E6%B4%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774104691B86493E1%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615997618468438808%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227589595842722417689%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%91%E5%B9%B4%E6%B4%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773239504,"group_id":"7589595842722417689","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"૮ ・ﻌ・ა","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+VWqeQ57F6c3N5StPXnIN/MPdTSHj+FwJ5T0wxqVFsJ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/db62cf3e048d45cf82f98d364f04e3f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620957&x-signature=XMYIyfG6Ym5fxPVv2bNz%2BOdqU%2BA%3D","user_id":"2872381865202092","user_name":"小鱼钓小猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2872381865202092","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1777193486,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":36,"name":"马上发帖","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bac86db20ea02e8e0eb989703e0d9a43","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3870c3280f5de1e0496c3327d86d111d"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7589595842722417689","book_info":{"abstract":"【诸天流】+【系统】+【圆梦】
